title: Machine Learning Intern
description: Join our ML Platform team to design and build scalable predictive models, collaborate with data engineers to deploy models, and work on data cleaning pipelines.
eligibility: B.Tech/M.Tech in Computer Science or related fields with solid programming background.

title: Frontend Development Intern (React)
description: We are seeking a React Developer intern to craft interactive components, optimize user interfaces, and collaborate with product designers to implement pixel-perfect web screens.
eligibility: Self-taught developers or students with active portfolios demonstrating React/JS apps.

title: Product Management Intern
description: Assist our Product Lead with market analysis, write detailed product requirement documents (PRDs), run user feedback sessions, and coordinate with developers.
eligibility: MBA candidates or B.Tech graduates with strong communication and analytical skills.

title: Backend Development Intern (Python)
description: Collaborate on database design, optimize APIs, deploy server microservices in Docker containers, and write unit tests.
eligibility: Active CS/IT undergraduate students with backend project portfolios on GitHub.

title: UI/UX Design Intern
description: Conduct competitor research, create wireframes and high-fidelity interactive prototypes in Figma, and build out design systems for mobile and web apps.
eligibility: Design school students or visual artists with portfolio links demonstrating UI/UX layouts.
